name: insurance_v1
description: Digital insurance with policies, claims, and agents
create_sql:
-- Schema: insurance_v1 (Digital insurance with policies, claims, and agents)

CREATE TABLE policyholders (
  holder_id INT PK,
  full_name VARCHAR,
  dob DATE,
  email VARCHAR,
  city VARCHAR,
  occupation VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE insurance_products (
  product_id INT PK,
  name VARCHAR,
  type VARCHAR,
  min_premium DECIMAL(10,2),
  max_sum_insured DECIMAL(14,2),
  tenure_years INT
);

CREATE TABLE policies (
  policy_id INT PK,
  holder_id INT FK(policyholders),
  product_id INT FK(insurance_products),
  sum_insured DECIMAL(14,2),
  premium_annual DECIMAL(10,2),
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  status VARCHAR
);

CREATE TABLE claims (
  claim_id INT PK,
  policy_id INT FK(policies),
  claim_type VARCHAR,
  claim_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  filed_date DATE,
  status VARCHAR,
  settled_amount DECIMAL(12,2),
  settled_date DATE
);

CREATE TABLE agents (
  agent_id INT PK,
  name VARCHAR,
  license_no VARCHAR,
  region VARCHAR,
  active_policies INT,
  commission_pct DECIMAL(4,2),
  joined_date DATE
);
